safeInteger.$comment: JSON Schema's mathematical integer model accepts a parsed lexical 1.0. Contract decoders MUST reject every lexical float with float_not_allowed before schema validation; see golden/raw_wire_negative_vectors.

safePath.$comment: JSON Schema enforces normalized POSIX path shape. UTF-8 byte length and Unicode NFC are mandatory application-boundary checks because maxLength counts code points and JSON Schema cannot assert NFC.

structuralPath.$comment: JSON Schema enforces printable slash-delimited normalized tokens. UTF-8 byte length and Unicode NFC are mandatory application-boundary checks because maxLength counts code points and JSON Schema cannot assert NFC.

namespace.$comment: UTF-8 byte length and Unicode NFC are mandatory application-boundary checks because maxLength counts code points and JSON Schema cannot assert NFC.

fileEvidenceEnvelope.$comment: Only kind=file inventory nodes may use this envelope. Application-level closure MUST also prove that every locator path and fingerprint match that same node's identity path and file digest.

oneOf.$comment: Every alternative edge requires a branch group. A null condition or a copied outer condition with any polarity is accepted here only as a dynamic-dispatch candidate because JSON Schema cannot inspect the referenced structure. Application validation MUST resolve branch_group_id to a structure with kind=branch_group and subtype=dynamic_dispatch for those exceptions; when condition is non-null it MUST equal the enclosing outer condition. Otherwise an ordinary alternative MUST use case|default polarity.
